queue_item.action: Correlate observed interaction latency with overlapping long-animation-frame windows while preserving the distinction between temporal overlap and causation.

progress.finding: Event Timing and Long Animation Frame records share the Performance Timeline time basis, so bounded interval overlap can identify temporal co-occurrence without asserting causation.
progress.verification: Five deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime.
progress.privacy_boundary: No DOM targets, selectors, script URLs, user-agent strings, or private content are emitted.

handoff: Vercel Studio should install the R-005, R-006, and R-007 observers behind a development-only evidence switch, compare overlap output against a browser trace, and keep congestion, interaction latency, and temporal correlation as three separate claims.
